heroQuote: Two souls, one heart, forever entwined.

story.title: A Chance Encounter
story.description: It was a rainy evening at a mutual friend's art gallery in Mumbai. Priya was admiring a painting when Arjun accidentally spilled his coffee nearby. That clumsy moment turned into a three-hour conversation neither of them wanted to end.

story.title: The Journey Begins
story.description: From late-night calls to weekend getaways in Coorg and Goa, every moment together felt like a page from a love story. They discovered shared dreams, laughter, and a love for filter coffee and old Bollywood songs.

story.title: He Asked, She Said Yes
story.description: Under a canopy of fairy lights at their favorite rooftop restaurant in Jaipur, Arjun got down on one knee with a ring that sparkled like the stars above. Priya's tearful 'yes' echoed into the night sky.

story.title: Officially Forever
story.description: Surrounded by family and closest friends, the engagement ceremony was a beautiful blend of tradition and joy. The exchange of rings marked the beginning of their forever, with blessings pouring in from every corner.

story.title: The Big Day
story.description: At the majestic Grand Palace in Udaipur, with the Aravalli hills as their backdrop, Priya and Arjun took their sacred vows. Every ritual, every smile, every tear was a testament to a love story written in the stars.
